evidence_summary: Establish the internal group dynamic and thematic conflict through a walking debate. The tension shifts from abstract philosophical desires to immediate survival anxiety, using the physical movement along the road to define character relationships.

A debate breaks out between the Scarecrow (who wants brains) and the Woodman (who wants a heart). Dorothy remains caught in the middle, distracted by the practical worry of their dwindling food supplies.
From philosophical debate to grounded anxiety.
Characters walking in a loose line, engaged in philosophical discussion.
Group movement continues but with an atmosphere of practical worry and tension.
A debate over brains versus hearts transitions into a concern for food.
